user.title: Tuya BLE Mesh Device
user.description:
Enter the BLE MAC address and mesh credentials.

Note: Default credentials (out_of_mesh/123456) are factory defaults. Mesh credentials are stored in the Home Assistant config database.

sig_bridge.title: SIG Mesh Bridge Configuration
sig_bridge.description: Configure the BLE bridge daemon connection for {name}.

telink_bridge.title: Telink Bridge Light Configuration
telink_bridge.description: Configure the BLE bridge daemon connection for {name}.

sig_plug.title: SIG Mesh Plug — Auto Provisioning
sig_plug.description:
The device **{name}** will be provisioned automatically.

A random NetKey and AppKey are generated. The DevKey is derived from the ECDH provisioning exchange. All keys are saved in the Home Assistant config database.

Ensure the device is in factory-reset state (advertising Provisioning Service 0x1827) and within BLE range, then click Submit.

confirm.title: {name} ({mac})

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter Mesh Credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication failed. Please re-enter the mesh credentials to reconnect.

error.invalid_bridge_host: Invalid bridge host. Use a hostname or IP address (not a URL). Loopback and link-local addresses are not allowed.
error.invalid_credential_length: Mesh name and password must be 16 bytes or fewer.
error.invalid_vendor_id: Invalid Vendor ID (expected 1–4 hex digits, e.g. 0x1001).
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to bridge daemon. Verify the host/port and that the daemon is running.
error.provisioning_failed: Provisioning failed. Ensure the device is in factory-reset state, within BLE range, and try again.

identify.name: Identify device
identify.description: Flash the device LED to make it easy to find.

set_log_level.name: Set log level
set_log_level.description: Change BLE mesh logging verbosity without restarting Home Assistant.

level.name: Level
level.description: Logging level: debug, info, warning, or error.

provisioning_failed.title: Device provisioning failed
provisioning_failed.description: Could not provision {device}. Ensure it is in factory-reset state and within BLE range, then reconfigure the integration.

bridge_unreachable.title: Bridge unreachable
bridge_unreachable.description: Cannot reach the BLE bridge at {host}:{port}. Check network connectivity and that the bridge daemon is running.
